name: Response Coherence
summary: Evaluates a full multi-turn conversation across 5 dialogue dimensions on a 1–5 scale (coherence, fluency, tone, naturalness, relational acuity).
description: An LLM-as-a-Judge dialogue analyst that evaluates an entire multi-turn user/assistant conversation — not isolated turns — across five dimensions on a 1–5 integer scale: relevance & coherence, fluency & quality, tonal & stylistic alignment, naturalness & phrasing, and social & relational acuity. It weights turns by their impact on user need fulfillment, safety, and conversational flow, and returns a dict of dimension-to-score.
